creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
After print/cups has been updated from 2.1 to 2.2.2, the printing queues vanished in www/firefox (50/51) and recent mail/claws-mail. Only print to file and default LPR are present. This happened out of the blue after updating the port.

This is most prominet on all 12-CURRENT 9recent revision) and also on 11-STABLE.
